heroHeadline: Plumber in Welland & the Niagara Region — 24/7 Emergency Plumbing
heroSubheading: Otterly reliable. Professional, start to finish.
heroBody: Looking for a plumber near you? Ottr Plumr is your local Niagara plumber for emergency plumbing, drain cleaning, water heater repair, sump pumps, furnaces and boilers — across St. Catharines, Niagara Falls, Welland and every town in between.

reviews.quote: Great service by Alex. Outstanding job on the replacement of the kitchen faucet. Thank you for the care and the expertise for doing a great job. Alex was amazing and friendly.
reviews.name: rtpom M

reviews.quote: Prompt service and friendly manner. Worked quickly to diagnose the problem (fridge water line) which he replaced with a steel beaded line that will last and not dry out. Great response.
reviews.name: Donald W Hawken

reviews.quote: He is an honest and a professional plumber. He promptly arrived to take care of our clogged sink drainage and quickly diagnosed and fixed the issue. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: Jansin Ozkur

faqs.q: What plumbing services do you offer?
faqs.a: We offer a wide range of services including drain cleaning, leak repairs, water heater installations, pipe replacements, toilet repairs, heating, sump pumps, and more.

faqs.q: Are you available for emergency plumbing services?
faqs.a: Yes, we provide 24/7 emergency plumbing services. If you have a plumbing issue that can't wait, call us immediately at 289-488-1007.

faqs.q: How much do your services cost?
faqs.a: Pricing depends on the type of service and complexity of the issue. We believe in transparent pricing and will always provide an upfront estimate before starting any work.

faqs.q: Do you offer warranties on your work?
faqs.a: Yes, we stand behind our work with a satisfaction guarantee. Most of our services come with a warranty that covers labor and parts.
We proudly serve the entire Niagara Region, including Welland, St. Catharines, Niagara Falls, Fort Erie, Port Colborne, Thorold, Lincoln, Grimsby, Pelham, and more.

faqs.q: How can I schedule an appointment?
faqs.a: You can schedule an appointment by calling us at 289-488-1007, booking online through our Jobber booking link, or filling out our contact form.
